name: @poc/payment-sim
description: POC: two-phase payment simulation using the live qwuack npm package (Redis soft ledger), MySQL final ledger, and RabbitMQ pub/sub balance settlement

scripts.test: docker compose up -d --wait && (POC_PAYMENT_SIM=1 bun test tests/payment-flow.test.ts --timeout 60000; code=$?; docker compose down -v --remove-orphans; exit $code)
scripts.test:keep: docker compose up -d --wait && POC_PAYMENT_SIM=1 bun test tests/payment-flow.test.ts --timeout 60000
scripts.load: docker compose up -d --wait && (POC_LOAD_TEST=1 bun test tests/load.test.ts --timeout 1500000; code=$?; docker compose down -v --remove-orphans; exit $code)
scripts.load:keep: docker compose up -d --wait && POC_LOAD_TEST=1 bun test tests/load.test.ts --timeout 1500000
